---

## USAGE INSTRUCTIONS

This is the TEMPLATE for `LIVE_PROJECT_STATE.md`.

When Sprint 1 begins, ChatGPT will copy this template and create the live version at the root level as `LIVE_PROJECT_STATE.md`. Any AI agent may update LIVE_PROJECT_STATE.md after a significant state change. The human owner is the final authority on all state decisions.

**Update Protocol:**
1. Any agent may commit updates to LIVE_PROJECT_STATE.md
2. Updates must be factual and observable (no speculation)
3. Always include timestamp and updating agent ID
4. Never remove historical state — append new state below prior state
5. Tag significant changes with `[STATE CHANGE]` for easy scanning
